name: vbvr-licon-96k
description: LiconStudio VBVR LoRA for LTX-2.3 — Stage 1 foundation checkpoint (96K training steps). LoRA rank 32, trained on 96K VBVR general videos with lr=1e-4 cosine schedule.
test_prompt: a person opens a door and walks through into a bright room
notes: ComfyUI key format: diffusion_model.transformer_blocks.N.attn1.to_k.lora_A.weight. 2496 keys. Stage 1 of 3-stage training — lowest quality, good for ablation.
